response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and PostgreSQL-equivalent systems (MongoDB, SQL), and demonstrates strong architectural and collaboration skills. His work on scalable platforms (Optilyz, re:cinq) and open-source projects aligns well with the role. However, his recent experience leans more toward senior-level responsibilities, and his direct exposure to PostgreSQL and renewable energy/construction tech is limited.
strengths: Proven fullstack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and REST APIs
Experience building scalable platforms and integrating multiple data sources
Strong collaboration and mentorship skills, with contributions to open-source projects
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role due to extensive senior experience
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB/SQL instead)
Recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure rather than the specified domain
